'''jashoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcrash|headcrash]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcrash|headcrash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jashoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæshereth|jæshereth]] || [[word:jæsherej|jæsherej]] || [[word:jæsheresh|jæsheresh]] || [[word:jæshere|jæshere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashoshoroth|jashoshoroth]] || [[word:jashoshoroj|jashoshoroj]] || [[word:jashoshorosh|jashoshorosh]] || [[word:jashoshoro|jashoshoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashoroth|jashoroth]] || [[word:jashoroj|jashoroj]] || [[word:jashorosh|jashorosh]] || [[word:jashoro|jashoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashofrofth|jashofrofth]] || [[word:jashofrofj|jashofrofj]] || [[word:jashofrofsh|jashofrofsh]] || [[word:jashofrof|jashofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jashorotho|jashorotho]] || [[word:jashorojo|jashorojo]] || [[word:jashorosho|jashorosho]] || [[word:jashoroko|jashoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jashoroth|jashoroth]] || [[word:jashoroj|jashoroj]] || [[word:jashorosh|jashorosh]] || [[word:jashoro|jashoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jashorothol|jashorothol]] || [[word:jashorojol|jashorojol]] || [[word:jashoroshol|jashoroshol]] || [[word:jashorokol|jashorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jashoroothotho|jashoroothotho]] || [[word:jashoroojojo|jashoroojojo]] || [[word:jashorooshosho|jashorooshosho]] || [[word:jashorooko|jashorooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jashorothon|jashorothon]] || [[word:jashorojon|jashorojon]] || [[word:jashoroshon|jashoroshon]] || [[word:jashorokon|jashorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jashorothooro|jashorothooro]] || [[word:jashorojooro|jashorojooro]] || [[word:jashoroshooro|jashoroshooro]] || [[word:jashorokooro|jashorokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
